response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements implemented during the game's reconstruction. Through the addition of optimization features, we have nearly doubled the frame rate. However, the integration of new hardware-intensive functionalities, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces new performance considerations. We aim to maintain a balanced approach.  

Image #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the redeveloped game, each character possesses a specific stomach capacity that dictates the amount of "body fluid" they can accommodate within their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr.Anya can retain up to 4000ml of sperm without overflow, whereas Alet is limited to 2800ml. Male test subjects release varying amounts of fluid during climax: a Dreamer typically expels approximately 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing transfers 400-600ml into their partner.  

Images #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice visual effects. The fluid effects are not pre-programmed in sexual scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy levels, and stamina. Certain character abilities, derived from testing with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or significant squirting.  

Images #4 and #5 depict real-time body interactions and skin decals in VR, with hands moving via a VR controller. Images #6, #7, and #8 present previews of upcoming bondage equipment and cooperative sexual scenarios. More details will be released in the coming months.  

The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
